title: Looking for a CRM expert in automations and integrations (Spanish expert in México)
excerpt: We are looking for an expert to develop our business flow and integrations.

posts.author: RHINO (RHINO PERFORMANCE)
posts.cookedHtml: We are looking for an expert to develop our business flow and integrations.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hola @RHINO

Welcome to the monday.com community!

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialize in integrations and custom requirements. We have a wealth of experience in many different solutions so I’m confident we can help. Yo tambien aprendo un poco Espanol

Please feel free to return by email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to meet with you and see how we can help.

Meet with Peta

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml: Que tal @RHINO, podemos ayudarte. I sent you a PM

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @RHINO and welcome to the monday.com community forums. You’ll find a lot of great partners and answers here as you develop you workflows in monday.

I work with CarbonWeb and we are a monday.com partner that specializes in a component-by-component process. We thrive on seeing a company’s complete workflow come to life. I would be interested in learning more about you, your company, and your process if you think that would be valuable.

If you would like to schedule a time, please do so here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get started!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: Ivan1804 (Iván Guzmán)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hola, buenas tardes.

Mi nombre es Iván Guzmán, analista especialista en monday.com y radico en la Ciudad de México. Puedo brindarte el soporte que requieras con la implementación de un CRM desde cero, adaptado a tus necesidades y las de tu equipo.

Para cualquier asesoría gratuita podemos ponernos en contacto a través de este medio o por correo electrónico para agendar una cita.

Te deseo mucho éxito.

Saludos.

Iván Guzmán
Monday Analyst
ivanrgj@outlook.com

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @RHINO

Welcome to the monday community!

monday .com is a popular work OS for streamlining workflows, which in turn, improves workforce productivity and efficiency. If you are looking for an expert who can help you develop business flow and monday CRM integrations, I would recommend you seek help from certified monday partners.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com
